## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.5

### 📷 Camera Live View
- Keeps the camera entity focused on native Home Assistant live view and camera state instead of exposing X-Sense app setup and tuning controls.
- Removes camera setup/tuning controls from Home Assistant, including camera switches, selects, numbers, and unused camera config write helpers.
- Keeps regular camera motion as the Home Assistant motion binary sensor so users can use normal Home Assistant history, logbook, and automations.

### 🔔 Camera AI Notifications
- Keeps AI detections on the Home Assistant event entity for blueprint and automation use.
- Removes duplicate AI detection binary sensors and last-detection timestamp/history sensors that overlapped with event-based notifications.
- Cleans up old AI and camera setup entities from the Home Assistant entity registry after upgrade.

### 🧪 Device Actions and Diagnostics
- Aligns SBS10/XS03-iWX RF smoke self-test payloads with the Android app path.
- Adds sanitized debug logging around button actions and shadow updates without logging full serial numbers.
